features.name: task with module-scope signal in posedge event control
features.description: Code should include a task that references a module-scope signal inside a posedge event control expression

features.name: task with module-scope signal in negedge event control
features.description: Code should include a task that references a module-scope signal inside a negedge event control expression

features.name: task with multiple signals in edge-sensitive event control
features.description: Code should include a task that references module-scope signals inside an edge-sensitive event control with multiple signals

features.name: implicit sensitivity list in always block
features.description: Code should include an implicit sensitivity list using @* or @(*) in an always block that reads module-scope signals

features.name: nested task with timing control capturing module-scope signal
features.description: Code should include a nested or called task that uses a module-scope signal within a timing control and relies on automatic signal capture
